category_sources: source_facts.description says halibut is a document preparation system; official Halibut page describes it as a documentation production system for software manuals.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is halibut; official Halibut homepage and user manual use Halibut.
docs_sources: Official Halibut homepage links to the release documentation in HTML; official Halibut User Manual is the dedicated documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Halibut homepage gives the git clone URL for development sources.
tags_sources: Official Halibut homepage says it produces multiple output formats for software manuals; source_facts.executables lists the halibut CLI.
